{% extends "documentation.html" %} {% block title %}{{ page.title }} | {{ super() }} {% endblock title %} {% block doc_content %}

{{page.title}}

{{page.content | safe}} {% set page_nav_parent = page.nav_ancestors | last %} {% if page.nav_prev or page_nav_parent or page.nav_next %}

{% endif %} {% endblock doc_content %}
